semantics.accept: A conforming validation pipeline MUST accept the document (all layers pass, given catalog.json and policy.example.json).
semantics.reject: A conforming validation pipeline MUST reject the document no later than the declared layer. Rejecting earlier is conformant: the published Layer-1 schema's deny-by-default rules catch several Layer-4 violations structurally.

cases.description: Smallest conforming document: meta, empty datasets, one text component.
Class A: parameter, aggregate and list datasets, metrics, table with badge and formats, filter bar.
Class AV: layered AIRMark graphic with structured-predicate transform and dual axes.
Class AVI: point selection with condition encoding, drilldown setParameter, navigate to registered route.

cases.violation: Required top-level property `layout` is absent.
Unknown non-extension top-level property `endpoints` (deny by default; also smuggles a URL).
Component id contains whitespace and punctuation, violating the id grammar.
Filter supplies both `value` and `parameter`; exactly one is permitted.
Metric component references datasetId `doesNotExist`, which is not defined in `datasets`.
Dataset source `invoices` does not exist in the catalog.
List dataset requests field `discount_pct`, which the `orders` source does not declare.
`sum` applied to enum field `status`; the catalog declares no aggregations for it.
Filter references parameter `missingParam`, which is not defined in `parameters`.
Table column `region` is not among the fields returned by its bound dataset.
Two components share the id `revenueMetric`; component ids must be unique.
Chart encoding references `profit`, which is neither a field nor an alias in the bound dataset's output.
Interaction targets component `ghostChart`, which does not exist in the layout.
Navigate action targets route `adminPanel`, which is not registered in the catalog.
Dataset and table request `cost_basis` (classification `financial-internal`), denied by policy.example.json.
Dataset `limit` of 250000 exceeds the policy's maximumRows ceiling of 5000.
Graphic carries a `data` source with a remote URL; graphics never carry data.
Transform filter is an expression string, not a structured predicate.
Mark carries a URL-valued `href` property.
Mark type `geoshape` is outside the core AIRMark allowlist.
`calculate` is an expression-bearing transform and is not part of AIRMark.
